features.featureTitle: When a new order is successfully placed via the placeOrder backend function, immediately trigger a WhatsApp notification to the number 9137202881 (formatted as +919137202881) by opening a pre-filled WhatsApp message URL. The notification must be sent from the frontend immediately after a successful order placement (i.e., after the placeOrder mutation resolves successfully). The message must include: Order ID, buyer's full name, country, phone number, address, a list of all ordered items (product name and quantity for each), the order total in € (Euro), and the order timestamp. Construct the WhatsApp deep-link URL as https://wa.me/919137202881?text=<URL-encoded message> and open it in a new browser tab (window.open) so the admin/owner receives the notification. The notification flow must not block or interfere with the customer's order confirmation redirect.
